badge_title: Make 102 Introduction to CO2 Laser Cutting
badge_description: This badge recognizes students who have demonstrated competency in safely operating CO2 laser cutting equipment in the NJIT Makerspace.
earning_criteria_text: Complete all online safety modules and pass the final assessment with 90% or higher. Demonstrate correct operation of the CO2 laser cutter in an in-person practical session supervised by a certified Makerspace instructor.
